fields.name: checkouteventtype
fields.label: Checkout Event Type
fields.description: Optional Launch event fired when order summary loads.

fields.name: back-path
fields.label: Back Path
fields.description: Where to navigate on BACK. Use a full path (e.g. /en/checkout) or just a page name (e.g. checkout). .html is added automatically on author.

fields.name: confirm-path
fields.label: Confirm Path
fields.description: Where to navigate on CONFIRM ORDER. Use a full path (e.g. /en/order-confirmation) or just a page name (e.g. order-confirmation). Order number appended as ?order=. .html is added automatically on author.

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block
